channel.title: Vienna Public Transport — Disruptions & Commuter Info
channel.description: Active disruptions, construction works and restrictions from official sources (Wiener Linien, ÖBB, VOR/VAO, City of Vienna).

item.title: Wien Westbahnhof: Mariahilfer Street from Europaplatz and Mariahilfer Belt to Palmgasse and Gerstnerstraße
item.description: The actual area of Mariahilfer Straße is to be closed for vehicle traffic. [25.05.2026 – 30.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
The actual area of Mariahilfer Straße is to be closed for vehicle traffic.
[25.05.2026 – 30.06.2026]

item.title: 10: delays
item.description: irregular intervals in both directions. Reason: defective vehicle. [On 24.05.2026]
item.content:encoded:
irregular intervals in both directions. Reason: defective vehicle.
[On 24.05.2026]

item.title: 1: False Parker service from Rear Zollamtsstraße
item.description: After an service obstruction there are different intervals. [On 24.05.2026]
item.content:encoded:
After an service obstruction there are different intervals.
[On 24.05.2026]

item.title: O: False Parker service from Rear Zollamtsstraße
item.description: After an service obstruction there are different intervals. [On 24.05.2026]
item.content:encoded:
After an service obstruction there are different intervals.
[On 24.05.2026]

item.title: 40: service obstruction False Parker
item.description: After an service obstruction there are different intervals. [On 24.05.2026]
item.content:encoded:
After an service obstruction there are different intervals.
[On 24.05.2026]

item.title: Aumannplatz 1 to Gentzgasse and Türkenschanzstraße
item.description: in the shadow of track construction works of Wiener Linien GmbH & Co KG, the pipe laying work takes place during the day in the area of the roadway and the bicycle strip and when the … is blocked [04.05.2026 – 30.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
in the shadow of track construction works of Wiener Linien GmbH & Co KG, the pipe laying work takes place during the day in the area of the roadway and the bicycle strip and when the … is blocked
[04.05.2026 – 30.06.2026]

item.title: U2/U5: Siebenbrunnengasse from junction Siebenbrunnenplatz and Reinprechtsdorfer Straße to 44
item.description: Detailed information about the construction project U2 / U5 can be obtained via the ombudsperson of the respective metro section. [Since 28.02.2021]
item.content:encoded:
Detailed information about the construction project U2 / U5 can be obtained via the ombudsperson of the respective metro section.
[Since 28.02.2021]

item.title: Roadway Hauptstraße from Emmerich-Teuber-Platz and Juchgasse and Apostelgasse to slaughterhouse gas
item.description: Only the existing bus stop at the Rabengasse will be moved locally. [Since 09.03.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Only the existing bus stop at the Rabengasse will be moved locally.
[Since 09.03.2026]

item.title: U2/U5: Mariahilfer Street from Stiftgasse to Erika-Weinzierl-Platz and Kirchengasse
item.description: Detailed information about the construction project U2 / U5 can be obtained from the ombudsperson of the respective metro section. since 12. June 2023 the … will be [Since 28.02.2021]
item.content:encoded:
Detailed information about the construction project U2 / U5 can be obtained from the ombudsperson of the respective metro section. since 12. June 2023 the … will be
[Since 28.02.2021]

item.title: Stadionbrücke from Ludwig-Koeßler-Platz and Erdberger Lands to Schüttelstraße and Stadionallee
item.description: The repair work and necessary conversion work on the Stadionbrücke due to the extension of the 18 tram line will be carried out in several phases of construction. [Since 03.02.2025]
item.content:encoded:
The repair work and necessary conversion work on the Stadionbrücke due to the extension of the 18 tram line will be carried out in several phases of construction.
[Since 03.02.2025]
